nasb.text: Solomon said to God, “You have dealt with my father David with great lovingkindness, and have made me king in his place.

esv.text: And Solomon said to God, “You have shown great and steadfast love to David my father, and have made me king in his place.

cnv.text: 所羅門對　神說：“你曾經向我的父親大衛大施慈愛，使我接續他作王。

ccb.text: 所罗门回答说：“你厚待我父大卫，并让我继位。
